channel.title: Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: URL Pattern Matching in .NET
item.description: Working with URLs in .NET applications often involves pattern matching for routing, security policies, or content filtering. While you could write custom regex patterns or string comparisons, there's a better way: the Meziantou.Framework.Uri package brings standardized URL pattern matching to .NET. This package implements the WHATWG URL Pattern API specification, providing a consistent and powerful way to… Link to article: https://www.meziantou.net/url-pattern-matching-in-dotnet.htm?utm_medium=social&utm_source=syndication
